name: agent-org-codex
description: Codex worker-side package for the Skylence agent org: solo-worker conduct, build-slot serializer, execpolicy rules, ghost-probe helper, and Codex lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Codex worker conduct for the Skylence agent org.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native companion to the Claude Code agent-org plugin. It packages the Codex solo-worker skill, AGENTS.md guidance, execpolicy rules for build-slot and nextest safety, helper scripts used by the Solo-orchestrated worker lane, and Codex lifecycle hooks for SessionStart steering plus PreToolUse build-slot checks.
defaultPrompt: Invoke solo-worker and read my todo brief.
